score_range_label.zh: 中等确信度 (50-69) — 分水岭日

position_advice.en: 56% (Reduced from 58% — wait for Hyperscaler Blitz + FOMC + GDP results today)
position_advice.zh: 56%（从 58% 小幅减仓——等待今日 Hyperscaler Blitz + FOMC + GDP 结果）

condition.en: Tightening but Decelerating, Inflection in 3-4 Weeks
condition.zh: 紧缩但减速，拐点 3-4 周内

summary.en: No change in underlying liquidity data — this week's focus is on catalysts, not plumbing. TGA growth decelerated sharply from +$227B to +$82.7B — peak signal confirmed. Repo lending at $4M (from $10.5B) — acute stress fully resolved. SOFR stable at 3.67%. The structural drain ($388B over three weeks) has not reversed, but the path to TGA unwind is clear. Warsh (5/15 incoming Fed Chair) plans significant balance sheet reduction — the biggest medium-term risk. Today's FOMC statement will be watched for any language hinting at the policy transition.
summary.zh: 底层流动性数据无变化——本周焦点在催化剂而非管道。TGA 增速从 +2270 亿美元骤降至 +827 亿美元——见顶信号确认。Repo lending 400 万美元（从 105 亿美元）——急性压力完全解除。SOFR 稳定在 3.67%。结构性抽水（三周 3880 亿美元）尚未逆转，但 TGA 回落路径清晰。Warsh（5/15 上任的美联储主席）计划大幅缩表——最大中期风险。今日 FOMC 声明将被密切关注是否有暗示政策过渡的措辞。

fed_balance_sheet_change.en: +$1.7B (WoW) — nearly flat; Warsh plans significant QT from 5/15
fed_balance_sheet_change.zh: +17 亿美元（周环比）——接近持平；Warsh 计划 5/15 起大幅缩表

rrp_note.en: Effectively zero — no liquidity buffer remaining
rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——无流动性缓冲

tga_note.en: +$82.7B WoW — growth rate slowed sharply from +$227B; peak signal confirmed; seasonal unwind expected in 3-4 weeks
tga_note.zh: 周环比 +827 亿美元——增速从 +2270 亿美元骤降；见顶信号明确；预计 3-4 周内季节性回落

net_liquidity_change.en: -$82B (WoW) / -$388B (3-week) — drain decelerating; repo lending $4M confirms acute stress resolved
net_liquidity_change.zh: -820 亿美元（周环比）/ -3880 亿美元（三周）——抽水减速；Repo 400 万美元确认急性压力解除

details.en: Today is the watershed — not 'maybe', it's certain. Five major catalysts converge: FOMC statement (2pm ET), Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta after-hours reaction (already reported), Q1 GDP (8:30am ET), Apple after-hours (tonight), Amazon after-hours (tonight). The liquidity backdrop is stable-to-improving: TGA deceleration confirmed, repo stress resolved. The key risk is Warsh's QT plan — if FOMC statement hints at accelerated balance sheet reduction, it's a new headwind. Short-term TGA unwind ($200-300B back to system by mid-May) remains the near-term positive catalyst.
details.zh: 今天是分水岭——不是'可能'，是确定的。五个重大催化剂汇聚：FOMC 声明（美东时间下午 2 点）、Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta 盘后反应（已报告）、Q1 GDP（美东时间上午 8:30）、Apple 盘后（今晚）、Amazon 盘后（今晚）。流动性背景稳定偏改善：TGA 减速确认，repo 压力解除。关键风险是 Warsh 的缩表计划——如果 FOMC 声明暗示加速缩表，是新逆风。短期 TGA 回落（5 月中旬前向系统补充 2000-3000 亿美元）仍是近期正面催化剂。

status.en: Tightening, Decelerating — Warsh QT Biggest Medium-Term Risk
status.zh: 紧缩但减速——Warsh 缩表是最大中期风险

reason.en: Score holds at 48. No new H.4.1 data this week — underlying liquidity unchanged. TGA growth halved (+$82.7B vs +$227B), repo lending zeroed ($4M), SOFR stable 3.67%. The acute phase is definitively over. But Warsh (5/15) plans significant QT — NYT/WSJ/Barrons/Reuters all confirm. Today's FOMC statement is key: any language hinting at accelerated balance sheet reduction is a new headwind. Score stays at 48 until: (1) TGA confirmed peak + begins unwind, (2) Warsh policy direction clarified.
reason.zh: 分数维持 48。本周无新 H.4.1 数据——底层流动性不变。TGA 增速减半（+827 亿美元 vs +2270 亿美元），repo lending 归零（400 万美元），SOFR 稳定 3.67%。急性阶段明确结束。但 Warsh（5/15）计划大幅缩表——NYT/WSJ/Barrons/Reuters 全部确认。今日 FOMC 声明是关键：任何暗示加速缩表的措辞都是新逆风。分数维持 48，直到：(1) TGA 确认见顶并开始回落，(2) Warsh 5/15 后政策方向明确。

status.en: Strong but Facing the Test — 84% Beat Rate, AI Capex ROI Questioned
status.zh: 强劲但面临考验——84% beat rate，AI capex 回报率被质疑

reason.en: Score eased from 72 to 70. Q1 earnings tracking +15.1% YoY, 84% beat rate, average beat magnitude +12.3% (2x long-term average). Credit spreads (HY OAS ~285bps) at 25-year lows. But OpenAI's revenue report triggered AI chip selloff — market questioning AI capex ROI. Beat-and-drop continues outside semiconductors. Today's decisive test: Apple and Amazon after-hours. If Mag 5 collectively beat and rally, score goes to 80+. If beat-and-drop spreads to Mag 5, score falls to 55.
reason.zh: 分数从 72 降至 70。Q1 盈利追踪 +15.1% 同比，84% beat rate，平均超幅 +12.3%（长期均值两倍）。信用利差（HY OAS 约 285bps）处于 25 年低点。但 OpenAI 收入报告引发 AI 芯片抛售——市场质疑 AI capex 回报率。Beat and drop 在半导体以外持续。今日决定性测试：Apple 和 Amazon 盘后。如果 Mag 5 集体 beat 且上涨，分数升至 80+。如果 beat and drop 扩散到 Mag 5，分数降至 55。

status.zh: 边缘——约 60% 在 200 日均线上方，50 日趋势仍在下降

reason.en: Score holds at 48. Approximately 60% of stocks above 200DMA — just at the threshold. But Morningstar notes 'comeback hasn't been as powerful as you might think'. Three major sectors with negative YTD returns: Consumer Discretionary -0.13%, Healthcare -0.81%, Financials -3.45%. Dow Jones lagging S&P/Nasdaq — non-confirmation. 4/28 pullback: S&P -0.50%, Nasdaq -0.90% — breadth likely slipped back below 60%. Need breadth to hold above 60% for multiple sessions before upgrading.
reason.zh: 分数维持 48。约 60% 的股票在 200 日均线上方——刚在门槛。但 Morningstar 指出'反弹没有你想象的那么强劲'。三个主要板块 YTD 负收益：消费周期 -0.13%，医疗 -0.81%，金融 -3.45%。道琼斯落后 S&P/Nasdaq——不确认。4/28 回落：S&P -0.50%，Nasdaq -0.90%——广度可能已滑回 60% 以下。需要广度在 60% 以上维持多个交易日才能上调。

status.en: Hesitating After New Highs — 4/28 Pullback Warning
status.zh: 新高后犹豫——4/28 回落警告

reason.en: Score eased from 74 to 65. S&P 7,148 (-0.50%), Nasdaq 24,714 (-0.90%) on 4/28 — immediate pullback after 4/27 new highs is a warning. VIX ~18.20 (rising slightly). 10Y 4.360%, 30Y approaching 5.000% — yield pressure. Oil: WTI $96.74, Brent $101.95 (above $100). BTC -2.55%, ETH -3.76% — crypto diverging. Silver +1.27% outperforming gold. The 4/28 pullback after new highs is the most important near-term signal. If today's FOMC + Hyperscaler results trigger a recovery, score recovers to 70+. If selling continues, score falls to 55.
reason.zh: 分数从 74 降至 65。4/28 S&P 7,148（-0.50%），Nasdaq 24,714（-0.90%）——4/27 创新高后立即回落是警告。VIX 约 18.20（小幅上升）。10Y 4.360%，30Y 接近 5.000%——收益率压力。油价：WTI $96.74，Brent $101.95（突破 $100）。BTC -2.55%，ETH -3.76%——加密背离。白银 +1.27% 跑赢黄金。4/28 新高后回落是最重要的近期信号。如果今日 FOMC + Hyperscaler 结果触发反弹，分数回升至 70+。如果卖压持续，分数降至 55。

trading_summary.en:
56.1 — Moderate. Today is the watershed, not 'maybe', it's certain. Earnings are the engine — 84% beat rate, 12.3% above expectations (2x long-term average). Q1 tracking +15.1% YoY.

But the 4/28 pullback sounded a warning — S&P -0.50%, Nasdaq -0.90% immediately after new highs. OpenAI's revenue report triggered AI capex ROI questioning. The market is nervous.

56% position. Wait for today's FOMC + Hyperscaler earnings reaction + GDP + tonight's Apple/Amazon. Decide direction after results.

If Hyperscalers beat and rally: conviction rises to 65+, add to 65%. If beat-and-drop spreads to Mag 5: conviction drops to 45, cut to 40%. If mixed: hold 56%.
trading_summary.zh:
56.1 分，Moderate。今天是分水岭，不是'可能'，是确定的。盈利是发动机——84% beat rate，12.3% 超预期幅度（长期均值两倍）。Q1 追踪 +15.1% 同比。

但 4/28 回落发出警告——S&P -0.50%，Nasdaq -0.90%，新高后立即回落。OpenAI 收入报告引发 AI capex 回报率质疑。市场在紧张。

56% 仓位。等今天 FOMC + Hyperscaler 盈利反应 + GDP + 今晚 Apple/Amazon。结果出来后再决定方向。

如果 Hyperscalers beat 且上涨：确信度升至 65+，加仓到 65%。如果 beat and drop 扩散到 Mag 5：确信度降至 45，减仓到 40%。如果混合：维持 56%。

trading_quote: Today is the watershed. FOMC. GDP. Apple. Amazon. The market will tell us if this rally has legs. Wait for the answer, then act.

note.en: Pulled back from 4/27 ATH 7,173.91 — warning signal after new high
note.zh: 从 4/27 历史新高 7,173.91 回落——新高后警告信号

note.en: Pulled back from 4/27 ATH 24,887.10 — OpenAI AI capex concern weighing
note.zh: 从 4/27 历史新高 24,887.10 回落——OpenAI AI capex 担忧压制

note.en: Lagging — did not confirm new highs, mild pullback
note.zh: 落后——未确认新高，温和回落

note.en: Small caps pulling back — breadth concern
Rising — 30Y approaching 5.000%; yield pressure on equities
note.zh: 上升——30Y 接近 5.000%；收益率对股票形成压力

note.en: Dollar stable — political risk premium removed
note.zh: 美元稳定——政治风险溢价消除

note.en: Elevated — Hormuz risk premium; inflation pressure persists
note.zh: 高位——Hormuz 风险溢价；通胀压力持续

note.en: Above $100 — compressing margins, limiting rate cut space
note.zh: 突破 $100——压缩利润率，限制降息空间

note.en: Diverging from equity new highs — risk-off signal within risk assets
note.zh: 与股市新高背离——风险资产内部风险规避信号
跑输 BTC——更广泛的加密风险规避

note.en: Rising slightly from 18.02 — nervousness ahead of catalysts
note.zh: 从 18.02 小幅上升——催化剂前的紧张情绪

exchange_flow_detail.en: 52-week range: $60,074 – $126,198 | Diverging from equity ATH — key signal to watch
exchange_flow_detail.zh: 52 周区间：$60,074 – $126,198 | 与股市历史新高背离——关键信号

analysis.en: BTC -2.55% to $77,302 while S&P/Nasdaq made new all-time highs on 4/27 — a notable risk-off divergence. ETH -3.76% underperforming. Fear & Greed at 52 (neutral). Key support $75,000-$77,000 being tested. If Hyperscaler Blitz delivers beat-and-rally, BTC should recover toward $82,000-$85,000. If beat-and-drop spreads to Mag 5, BTC could break $75,000 and retest $70,000-$72,000.
analysis.zh: 4/27 S&P/Nasdaq 创历史新高时 BTC -2.55% 至 $77,302——显著的风险规避背离。ETH -3.76% 跑输。恐惧贪婪指数 52（中性）。关键支撑 $75,000-$77,000 正在测试。如果 Hyperscaler Blitz 带来 beat-and-rally，BTC 应回升至 $82,000-$85,000。如果 beat-and-drop 扩散到 Mag 5，BTC 可能跌破 $75,000 并回测 $70,000-$72,000。

analysis.en: Gold $4,709.00 (+0.33%), holding steady after recent pullback. Silver $75.97 (+1.27%) outperforming gold — gold/silver ratio ~62.0, declining (silver catching up). Structural bull market intact: geopolitical risk premium (Hormuz), dollar credibility concerns, central bank buying. Gold is the safe haven of choice in this environment.
analysis.zh: 黄金 $4,709.00（+0.33%），从近期回调中稳定。白银 $75.97（+1.27%）跑赢黄金——金银比约 62.0，下降（白银追赶）。结构性牛市完整：地缘政治风险溢价（Hormuz）、美元信誉担忧、央行购买。黄金是当前环境中首选的避险资产。

title.en: Hyperscaler Earnings Reaction — Beat-and-Drop Spreading to Mag 5?
title.zh: Hyperscaler 盈利反应——Beat-and-Drop 扩散到 Mag 5？

detail.en: Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta already reported — reaction is the key signal. Apple and Amazon report tonight. Five companies = 25% of S&P 500 weight. OpenAI's revenue report already triggered AI chip selloff, questioning AI capex ROI. If multiple Mag 5 beat-and-drop, the 'earnings support' narrative collapses and this rally is over. This is the single most important risk to monitor today.
detail.zh: Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta 已报告——市场反应是关键信号。Apple 和 Amazon 今晚报告。五家公司 = S&P 500 25% 权重。OpenAI 收入报告已引发 AI 芯片抛售，质疑 AI capex 回报率。如果多个 Mag 5 beat and drop，'盈利支撑'叙事崩溃，反弹到头。这是今天最重要的单一风险。

title.en: Warsh QT + FOMC — Fed Policy Transition Risk
title.zh: Warsh 缩表 + FOMC——美联储政策过渡风险

detail.en: Warsh (5/15 incoming Fed Chair) plans significant balance sheet reduction — NYT/WSJ/Barrons/Reuters all confirmed. Today's FOMC statement will be watched for any language hinting at accelerated QT. If Fed shifts from flat (+$1.7B WoW) to actively shrinking, it removes the one remaining positive liquidity factor and creates a new medium-term headwind. The 30Y approaching 5.000% adds to yield pressure.
detail.zh: Warsh（5/15 上任的美联储主席）计划大幅缩表——NYT/WSJ/Barrons/Reuters 全部确认。今日 FOMC 声明将被密切关注是否有暗示加速缩表的措辞。如果美联储从持平（周环比 +17 亿美元）转向主动缩表，将消除唯一剩余的正面流动性因素，创造新的中期逆风。30Y 接近 5.000% 加剧收益率压力。

title.zh: 油价 $102 + 收益率陡化 + 加密背离

detail.en: Brent $101.95 (above $100) — Iran Hormuz reopening was met with cold response. WTI $97. Oil at this level compresses corporate margins and limits the Fed's ability to cut rates. 2s10s steepening to +52bps ahead of FOMC. BTC -2.55%, ETH -3.76% — crypto diverging from equity new highs is a risk-off signal within risk assets. These three pressures are not individually fatal but together create a challenging backdrop.
detail.zh: Brent $101.95（突破 $100）——伊朗 Hormuz 重开被冷淡回应。WTI $97。油价在此水平压缩企业利润率，限制美联储降息能力。2s10s 在 FOMC 前陡化至 +52bps。BTC -2.55%，ETH -3.76%——加密与股市新高背离是风险资产内部的风险规避信号。这三重压力单独看不致命，但合在一起创造了挑战性背景。

title.en: Active — Upgraded. 4/28 Pullback After New Highs + AI Capex Concern
title.zh: 活跃且升级——4/28 新高后回落 + AI Capex 担忧

detail.en: Multiple active divergences: (1) S&P/Nasdaq made new ATH on 4/27 but immediately pulled back -0.50%/-0.90% on 4/28 — the most dangerous pattern. (2) OpenAI revenue report triggered AI chip selloff — market questioning whether AI capex spending will generate returns. (3) BTC -2.55% / ETH -3.76% while equities at ATH. (4) Dow lagging, not confirming new highs. (5) VIX ~18.20 at all-time highs. If today's Hyperscaler results show beat-and-drop for Mag 5, this becomes a textbook top divergence pattern.
detail.zh: 多重活跃背离：(1) S&P/Nasdaq 4/27 创新高，但 4/28 立即回落 -0.50%/-0.90%——最危险的形态。(2) OpenAI 收入报告引发 AI 芯片抛售——市场质疑 AI capex 支出是否会产生回报。(3) 股市创新高时 BTC -2.55% / ETH -3.76%。(4) 道指落后，未确认新高。(5) 历史新高时 VIX 约 18.20。如果今日 Hyperscaler 结果显示 Mag 5 beat and drop，这将成为教科书级顶部背离形态。
